title: Unique Party 73113 - Happy Balloon Birthday Party Bags, Pack of 8,multi
features: Pack of 8 Happy Balloon Birthday Party Plates
Paper plates measure approximately 23 cm in diameter
Ideal for serving food at an adult or kids birthday party
Combine with other Happy Balloon Birthday party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Add an eye-catching burst of colour to your party proceedings with these Eco-Friendly Happy Balloon Birthday Paper Plates! Featuring a vibrant foil balloon design and "Happy Birthday!" text, these extra-strong party plates are an ideal choice for serving food at any birthday party. Disposable plates also make your after party clean-up really quick and convenient, allowing you to spend more time celebrating with the guest of honour. As these plates are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Safety Warning No warning applicable
